name: @indexers/the-graph-flow
description: The Graph indexer for Sablier Flow

scripts.deploy-external:form: CHAIN=form bun run setup && graph deploy sablier-flow-form --node https://formapi.0xgraph.xyz/deploy --ipfs https://formapi.0xgraph.xyz/ipfs --deploy-key
scripts.deploy-external:lightlink: CHAIN=lightlink bun run setup && graph deploy --node https://graph.pegasus.lightlink.io/rpc --ipfs https://api.thegraph.com/ipfs/ lightlink/sablier-flow-lightlink
scripts.deploy-external:ultra-command: CHAIN=ultra bun run setup && graph deploy --node https://graph.evm.ultra.io --ipfs https://api.thegraph.com/ipfs/ --headers "$ULTRA_HEADERS" sablier-flow-ultra
scripts.deploy-external:xdc: CHAIN=xdc bun run setup && graph deploy --node https://graph.xinfin.network/ --ipfs https://api.thegraph.com/ipfs/ xdc/sablier-flow-xdc
scripts.deploy:abstract: CHAIN=abstract bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-abstract bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: CHAIN=arbitrum bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-arbitrum bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:arbitrum-sepolia: CHAIN=arbitrum-sepolia bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-arbitrum-sepolia bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:avalanche: CHAIN=avalanche bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-avalanche bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:base: CHAIN=base bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-base bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: CHAIN=base-sepolia bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-base-sepolia bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:berachain: CHAIN=berachain bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-berachain bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:blast: CHAIN=blast bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-blast bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:bsc: CHAIN=bsc bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-bsc bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:chiliz: CHAIN=chiliz bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-chiliz bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:experimental: CHAIN=experimental bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-experimental bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:gnosis: CHAIN=gnosis bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-gnosis bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:iotex: CHAIN=iotex bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-iotex bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:linea: CHAIN=linea bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-linea bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:mainnet: CHAIN=mainnet bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-ethereum bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:mode: CHAIN=mode bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-mode bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:optimism: CHAIN=optimism bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-optimism bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:optimism-sepolia: CHAIN=optimism-sepolia bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-optimism-sepolia bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:polygon: CHAIN=polygon bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-polygon bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:scroll: CHAIN=scroll bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-scroll bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:sei: CHAIN=sei bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-sei bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:sepolia: CHAIN=sepolia bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-sepolia bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:unichain: CHAIN=unichain bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-unichain bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:zksync: CHAIN=zksync bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-zksync bun run deploy
scripts.deploy:zksync-sepolia: CHAIN=zksync-sepolia bun run setup && NAME=sablier-flow-zksync-sepolia bun run deploy
scripts.template: bun run template-chain && bun run template-config && bun run template-env
